verses.text: Tua mah bangin zite aw, na pasalte uh Pasian thu umlo ahihkhak leh na gamtatna hangun Pasian thu a uptheihna dingun na pasalte uh thu na mang un. Kampau kul sese loin
na gamtat hoihna uh a muh uh ciangin Pasian thu hong um ding uh hi
Na hoihna dingun puatham kizepna ahi sambawlna, kham leh suangmanpha tawh kizepna, puan hoihnono silhnate na bulphuh kei un la
Pasian' muhna-ah a manpha mahmah ahi lungsim puakzia, a tul theilo sunglam hoihna na bulphuh zaw un
A beisa hunah Pasian muangin thu um numeite in a pasalte uh thu mangin, tu-a bang danin a hoihna dingun a kibawl uh hi
Sarah zong tu-a bangmahin gamta a, a pasal Abraham' thu mangin, “Topa aw,” a ci hi. Note zong a hoihin gamta-in, bangmah launa neiloin na om nak uh leh tu-in Sarah' tanute na hita uh hi

Tua mah bangin pasalte aw, note sangin na zite uh a thahatlo zawdeuh ahihna thu na phawk un. Note mah bangin Pasian' piak nuntakna a ngahte ahih uh manin na zite uh zahtak bawl un. Tua hi leh na thungetna uh bangmah in hong nawngkaisak lo ding hi.
A tawpna-ah kong gennop thu in: Lungsim leh ngaihsutna kikhat nei-in unau ki-itna lungsim nei un la, migi-in kiniamkhiat un

Hong bawlsiate siatna tawh thukkik loin hong samsia mite samsia kik kei un la, Pasian in note a hong sap lai-in thupha a hong piak dingin hong ciamsa ahih manin, hong siat bawlte thupha tawh na thukzaw un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Nuntak nuam deihin, hunhoih a zang nuamte in kamsia pau kei uh hen la, zuauthu gen kei ta uh hen
Gitlohna pelhin hoih gamtat uh hen la, mi tawh kilem ding hanciamin kilem theihna dingin hahkat ta uh hen
Topa in a thuman mite mu a, amaute' thungetna pia tawntung hi. Ahi zongin a gamtatsia mite Topa in a langbawl hi,” na ci hi
Note in a hoih gamtat ding utin hanciam le uh cin kua in hong bawlsia ding ahi hiam
A hoihin na gamtat manun gimna na thuak uh leh zong Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi. Mite kihta kei un la, lunghihmawh ngaihsut kei un

Na lungsim sung uhah Khrih zahtakbawl un la, amah Topa-in nei un. Note' lametna thu a hong dong a omkhak leh hoihtakin a genthei dingin kiging tawntung un la, ahi zongin lungnemna leh zahtakna lim tawh gen un
Khrih nungzui na hihna hangun na gamtat hoihna uh hong gensia-in hong simmawhbawl a om ciangin a maizum theihna dingun na lungsim uhah kisuan'na a om hetlo dingin na siangtho om un
Gamtatsia-in i om sangin Pasian' deihna ahih nak leh i gamtat hoihna hangin gimna i thuak hoihzaw hi

Khrih mahmah zong note-a' dingin si a, Pasian' kiangah hong tun'pih theihna dingin mihoih khat pen mihoihlote' mawhna hangin khatvei a si hi. Mite in ama leitung pumpi that a, ahi zongin Pasian in kha nuntakna a pia hi
Tua kha nuntakna tawh va pai-in thongkia-in a om khate kiangah thu a va hilh hi
Noah in teembaw a bawl hun laitakin Pasian in lungduai takin ngak hinapi-in hih kha a nei mite pawlkhat in Pasian' thu manglo uh hi. Teembaw sungah a om mi giat bek, tui in a suaktasak hi

Tui pen note a hong honkhia tuiphumna lim hi a, pumpi panin nin sawpkhiatna lim hiloin, Jesuh Khrih thawhkikna hangin lungsim siangthona dingin Pasian' tungah kamciamna lim ahi hi. Tua Jesuh thawhkikna in note hong honkhia ahi hi
Tu-in vantungah tua Khrih pai khin a, Pasian' taklamah omin, vantung mite leh ukna aana a neite khempeuh tungah a ukin a om hi.
